tools.name: agent-memory-benchmark
tools.purpose: Primary external harness for adapter-based Cortex benchmarking.

tools.name: locomo
tools.purpose: Long conversation memory benchmark assets and evaluation code.

notes: MemBench is already supported inside agent-memory-benchmark and does not need a separate clone right now.
DMR is not pinned yet because the canonical standalone repo still needs confirmation.
Use AMB as the first integration target; treat DMR coverage as adapter-level work until we confirm a better upstream harness.
